title: Sausage Mod
description: Have the dirty dirty block take over the world while you eat a sausage to boost you in the air. Feed em the sheeps cuz they love em, and throw em at the foxies cuz they love em too.
body:
# Dirty Dirty Sausage
yes i know it's incredibly random but I promise it can Enhance your gameplay experience

## Features

#### Ext-ray Dirty Dirty
Ext-ray Dirty Dirty spreads like a disease. Try it out!

![EXTRAY DIRTY DIRTY](https://media3.giphy.com/media/t4uX3w63nphBH7BrRu/giphy.gif)

#### Sausage
A mind blowing food item for launch time!
Eating one launches you in the air.
Sheep love to eat this item.

![SAUSAGE](https://media3.giphy.com/media/f1UP9Nlj11AUXkMe7L/giphy.gif)
